untranslatable_reason: Pattern description 'price begins climbing' is vague and lacks quantifiable entry conditions for the short position itself. The excerpt only provides exit signals without defining what triggers the initial short entry (e.g., how high/how fast must price climb to warrant exit). AEDT ascending/expanding pattern characteristics (higher highs, higher lows, widening range) would typically be detected via high > prev_high AND low > prev_low AND range > prev_range, but entry conditions for the short are not detailed. Pattern cannot be reliably backtested without precise entry trigger definitions.
